pr.title: Fix Tier1 monitor: replace stub with TradingView-aligned 21-strategy logic
pr.body: ## Summary Replaces the placeholder Tier1 monitor with TradingView-aligned logic for all 21 Minara Tier-1 strategies, plus **5-minute signal lifecycle** and **confirmed-position exit** monitoring. ## Signal lifecycle (every 5m) - **New trigger** → Telegram “signal active” + hint `/confirm {id}` - **Still active** → silent (updates `last_seen_at`) - **Disappeared** → Telegram “signal ended” - **Re-trigger** after flat → new active alert ## Confirmed positions - `/confirm 12` or `python3 scripts/tier1_monitor.py confirm 12 [price]` - Monitors strategy-specific exit rules (#1, #7, #8, #11, #12, #13) or default “signal no longer in direction” - **Close alert** on exit; `/close 12` for manual untrack ## Ops ```bash */5 * * * * python3 scripts/tier1_monitor.py run # or: python3 scripts/tier1_monitor.py loop ``` Telegram: `/confirm`, `/close`, `/status` (polled each cycle when bot token is set). ## Testing - `python3 -m py_compile scripts/tier1_monitor.py` - `python3 scripts/tier1_monitor.py run` — live Binance data-api
pr.author: jqz576-lab
